# Destructor Dagger
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Destructor%20Dagger&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Destructor Dagger
| desc = A dagger obtainted from the Master Destructor himself...
| slot = dagger
| tier = UT
| rarity = h

| rof = 90
| shots = 1
| minDmg = 105
| maxDmg = 175
| range = 
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 510
| fameb = 6
| feedp = 500

| effects = yes
| multihit = yes
| pierce = yes

| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by: [[Archdemon Malphas]].
|range2 = 5.3}}

<noinclude>
{{NavDaggers}}
</noinclude><noinclude>
[[Category:Daggers]]</noinclude>
